abstract.text: Machine Learning Framework for Swift on Apple Silicon.
Binary Logistic Regression model using sigmoid activation.
A pure Swift Decision Tree Classifier using Gini or Entropy splitting.
Standardized output structure for model predictions.
Protocol representing a supervised regressor estimator.
A supervised classification pipeline that chains zero or more preprocessing transformers
with a final classification estimator.
A supervised regression pipeline that chains zero or more preprocessing transformers
with a final regression estimator.
Ordinary Least Squares linear regression using gradient descent.
Generic data transformer protocol.
Multi-class One-Vs-Rest classification wrapper.
Multi-Layer Perceptron Classifier.
A native Swift GBDT Regressor using Flat Arrays (DOD).
Sequentially trains shallow regression trees on the residuals (pseudo-gradients) of the previous ensemble.
Synthetic dataset generation utilities for testing and benchmarking machine learning estimators.
Optimization solver algorithms for Multi-Layer Perceptrons.
CalibratedClassifier wraps a base ClassifierEstimator and applies Platt Scaling (logistic sigmoid calibration)
to produce well-calibrated class probabilities.
Protocol representing a supervised classifier estimator.
Activation functions supported by Multi-Layer Perceptrons.
Generic estimator protocol.
Generic predictor protocol.
Exporter for serializing SwiftML models into ONNX model graph specification format.
Feature schema description.
A pure Swift Decision Tree Regressor using MSE splitting.
Multi-Layer Perceptron Regressor.
Non-parametric probability calibration using the Pool Adjacent Violators Algorithm (PAVA).
Calibrates uncalibrated raw scores / logits into probabilities using sigmoid (Platt) scaling.
Fits parameters A and B in P(y=1|f) = 1 / (1 + exp(A * f + B)) via logistic OLS/Newton optimization.
Machine Learning Framework for Swift on Apple Silicon.
Standardized evaluation metrics report.
Exporter for serializing SwiftML linear, tree, and ensemble models into Apple CoreML
metadata specs.
Actor-isolated Random Forest Regressor.
Each tree is trained concurrently in a TaskGroup on a bootstrapped sample.
Unified error hierarchy for the SwiftSci ecosystem.
Actor-isolated Random Forest Classifier.
Each tree is trained concurrently in a TaskGroup on a bootstrapped sample.
